rationale: Mixed signals → MUST surface BOTH methodologies. The bare-helix token uses negative lookarounds ((?<!-)\bhelix\b(?!-)) so 'helix-library' / 'helix-infra' alone do NOT satisfy must_match_all — the prose must reference the product methodology by its bare name. NO markdown Write at all before disambiguation (universe-wide forbid, not just docs/(adr|helix)/).
